heading: Payment of costs incidental to services contributed by volunteers
label: 1473c Payment of costs incidental to services contributed by volunteers
text: Appropriations under this title in fiscal year 1992 and thereafter, may be made available for paying costs incidental to the utilization of services contributed by individuals who serve without compensation as volunteers in aid of work for units of the Department of the Interior.1See References in Text note below.1
notes: References in TextThis title, referred to in text, is title I of , , , known as the Department of the Interior and Related Agencies Appropriations Act, 1992. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 102–154105 Stat. 990Nov. 13, 1991
Prior Similar ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in the following prior appropriation act:, , .Pub. L. 101–512, title I, § 118104 Stat. 1937Nov. 5, 1990
